lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, used to model the balanced multirole fit, shield/booster MJ, five-gun power budget, and laden jump range on this hull.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner, cross-checked for the engineered shield, hull-reinforcement stack, and the class-7 FSD laden range.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Beluga Liner ship page — manufacturer specs, hull mass/speed, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Core slot sizes (class-7 FSD, five Medium hardpoints, six utility mounts, optional internals 6·6·6·6·5·5·4·3·3·3·3·1) and engineering blueprint data behind the loadout.

sources.label: Inara — Beluga Liner
sources.what: Stock hull stats, hardpoint and internal layout, hull price, and module sellers cross-checked for the multipurpose build.

sources.label: Fandom — Beluga Liner
sources.what: Manufacturer (Saud Kruger), hull role, and lore reference backing the dossier write-up.
